creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
Created attachment 254875
support pipebuf rlimit in shells/zsh

The attached patch extends zsh to support the new pipebuf rlimit.

Since the documentation must be rebuilt, yodl and texinfo are now needed as dependencies.

A part of the patch comes from https://www.zsh.org/mla/workers/2023/msg00591.html.

Tested on FreeBSD stable/14 at 4e8444d5750a, amd64 and i386.

-- Martin
